loop1.note: Showing Panel-1A aggregate readings from 3 active UPS feeders and 2 active BPDB feeders; 2 UPS feeders and 2 Solar Incomers are dark (no data).

loop1.note: Showing live power distribution across 8 active feeders (UPS, BPDB, Solar Incomers); 2 UPS feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data). Load % is omitted as no rated_kva is available for these meters.

loop1.note: Showing total active power — contracted capacity is unknown for this asset, so the consumption % and denominator are omitted.

loop1.note: Showing per-member panel rollup (Primary outgoing feeders); 2 members (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark and will render as honest blanks.
